label: Transparent Manatee motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Manatee transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated manatee form for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A gentle adult manatee with soft grey skin, rounded paddle flippers, broad tail, subtle wrinkles, calm face, faint seagrass-green water reflections on the grey body, accurate anatomy, crisp silhouette edges, and tactile natural skin texture.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show the full manatee body, snout, flippers, and tail without cropping.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves soft grey form, warm spring calm, and subtle seagrass-green tonal influence.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for transparency removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no landscape, no underwater scene, no second animal, no fish, no coral, no sea turtle, no dolphin, no decorative background, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board derived from the provided manatee cutout for "Morphous Manatee" / "Manatee".
Reference use: Treat the visible manatee motif as the source of truth. Extract soft grey skin, seagrass green water, warm spring clarity, rounded manatee form, gentle wrinkles, broad flipper rhythm, and slow wellness mood into the design system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, target 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography guidance, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius tokens, spacing tokens, shadow tokens, generated asset examples, and sample usage.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; recommend calm product UI pairing such as Geist for English and Noto Sans JP for Japanese. Use readable labels like "Slow Wellness", "Warm Spring", "やわらかな余白", and "水辺の操作".
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, calm operational wellness interface. Use 8px radius for most controls with softer 14px feature panels inspired by the rounded manatee body.
Color palette: use motif-derived colors only: Manatee Mist #d8ded8, Spring Foam #f5f1e8, Soft Grey #8e9894, Seagrass Green #6f8f76, Warm Silt #c7b896, River Teal #2f6f6b, Deep Spring #143736, Stone Ink #26302e, Shell Highlight #edf3ef.
Component language: pillowy but controlled controls, low-contrast grey-green surfaces, seagrass-green active states, teal focus rings, rounded tabs, calm cards, data charts with slow-flow curves, soft divider lines, tactile skin-grain texture.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no neon, no random brand names, no misspelled system name, no watermark, no crowded tiny text, no underwater photo background, no extra animals.

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for "Morphous Manatee" / "Manatee". It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent manatee motif and the visible light design-system board as references. Preserve the same soft grey manatee form, seagrass green water palette, warm spring wellness mood, rounded controls, tactile skin texture, calm dashboard patterns, and typography guidance.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, high-resolution 4K-class source board, target 3840x2160, at least 2400px wide. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, motif story, palette, typography, Japanese typography guidance, components, navigation, dashboard/data/charts, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius tokens, spacing tokens, shadow tokens, generated asset examples, and sample usage.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; keep Geist and Noto Sans JP guidance. Use short readable labels like "Deep Spring", "Slow Wellness", "夜の水辺", and "やさしい集中".
Visual details: dark background derived from Deep Spring #143736 and Stone Ink #26302e, foreground from Spring Foam #f5f1e8 and Shell Highlight #edf3ef, primary action in Seagrass Green #6f8f76, focus and charts in River Teal #2f6f6b, warm low-contrast accents from Warm Silt #c7b896, soft grey panels from Manatee Mist and Soft Grey adapted for dark mode.
Component language: calm shadcn/tweakcn product UI with rounded manatee-inspired panels, low-glare dark cards, seagrass active states, teal focus rings, soft separators, slow-flow charts, subtle skin-grain and water-ripple textures, readable forms and navigation.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no generic purple or blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no random brand names, no misspelled system name, no illegible text, no watermark, no underwater photo background, no extra animals.
